generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in my local news - a recent incident where expanded domestic security powers actually prevented a major attack. The new measures caught a suspicious package at a transit hub that authorities say would have caused significant harm. Critics say these powers infringe on civil liberties, but how can we afford to take risks when the threats are so real? #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
